'''''Coercion''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].<ref name="AJ9" />

Circa [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], ''Coercion'' served in [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Klime]]'s [[Ishanna system/Legends|Ishanna system]] forces.<ref name="AJ9" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Combat Moon (short story)|reprint=1}}
